title: NASCAR San Diego Weekend Connects Sailors, Community for Navy 250
description: Naval Base Coronado welcomed more than 100,000 visitors, race fans, service members, military families and community partners during the inaugural NASCAR San Diego Weekend, which celebrated the service's enduring connection to the American people.

body.text: Naval Base Coronado welcomed upward of 100,000 visitors, race fans, service members, military families and community partners during the inaugural NASCAR San Diego Weekend, June 19-21.
Secretary of War Pete Hegseth serves as the honorary starter for the NASCAR Cup Series race during NASCAR San Diego Weekend at Naval Base Coronado, June 21, 2026.
